titleStmt.title: SII 16.88: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 88. (A.R. No. 47-A of 1909.) UṆḌAVALLI, GUNTUR TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in front of the Bhāskarēśvara temple.
It records that Bōḍi Mādinēḍu having consecrated the Bhāskaraliṅga, constructed a well and made a grant of 1 puṭṭi of gram towards wages and 10 tūmus of land for offerings in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṁAnother inscription engraved above this reads:
śrī maṁgaḷagiri puṇyastā-
namaṁdu vūri paḍamaṭa-
nu kaṭamallaya guḍi ka-
ṭṭiṁcci śikarapratiṣṭa sē-
yiṁciri | śrīdēvēśaṁ
jagadīsvaraṁ paśupatiṁ śrī
vuṁḍavalliprabhō | The inscription stops abruptly here and is followed by the text published above. This has been wrongly noticed in the Annual Report.
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rā
jādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara mūrurāyara
gaṁḍa . Aṣṭadikkurāya
manōbhayaṁkara bhā
śagedappuvarāyaragaṁ
ḍa pūrvadakṣiṇa paścima
samudrādhīśvara yavana
rājyasthāpanācārya śrī vī
rapratāpa kṛiṣṇadēvamahā
rāyalu brithivirājya
ṁ śāyaṁgānu bōḍi
mādinēṁḍu bhāskaraliṁga
ṁpratiṣṭha sēIṁcci dēvuḷa vutta
rānanu bāvi kaṭiṁcci talli
taṁḍriki punyaṁgānu yā
ṭa pātṛnināri kuṁccala kū
linni . kha 1 yēṁdumu kṣē
traṁ nityanaivēdyānaku Ipiṁ
ccenu . śrī . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ .
paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālana
yōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupā
lanaṁ . dānāt svarggamavāpnō
ti pālanā daccutaṁ padaṁ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēta vasuṁddharā . ṣaṣṭhi rvva
rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . satyaṁ satya
ṁ punaḥ satyaṁ satyaṁ nityaṁ punaḥ
punaḥ . hē narāḥ sarva[dā (bhūyō)] yaḥ
pravarttadhvaṁ sukhāya ca . Idaṁ śrīvuṁ
ḍavallīśabhāskarēśvara śāsanaṁ .
pālayiṣyaṁti yē tēṣāṁ
pādakiṁkarakiṁkaraḥ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 16.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
